sizing_rule.note: Position size scaled inversively to 20-day rolling volatility calculated from log price changes adjusted by mean return. Volatility = sqrt(H), where H = sum of last 20 squared adjusted log changes divided by 19. Higher volatility → smaller position; lower volatility → larger position.

source_rule_text: Calculate volatility using a 20-day rolling standard deviation of log price changes adjusted by mean return, squared and averaged, to establish the basis for position sizing decisions.
